mapper.select:
SELECT su.id, su.username, su.nickname, sui.telephone, su.data_status, GROUP_CONCAT(sd.dept_name) AS dept_names, su.create_time FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_user su ON sur.user_id = su.id AND su.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN sys_user_info sui ON sui.user_id = su.id INNER JOIN sys_user_dept sud ON su.id = sud.user_id AND sud.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' WHERE sur.enabled = '1' AND sur.role_id = #{req.roleId}
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT(#{req.username},'%')
AND su.nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{req.nickname},'%')
GROUP BY su.id ORDER BY su.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT su.id, su.username, su.nickname, su.telephone, su.data_status, su.create_time, t1.dept_names FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_user su ON sur.user_id = su.id AND su.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN (SELECT ta.user_id, LISTAGG(ta.dept_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ta.dept_name) AS dept_names FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sud.user_id, sd.dept_name FROM sys_user_dept sud INNER JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' AND sd.data_status = '1' WHERE sud.enabled = '1') ta GROUP BY ta.user_id) t1 ON su.id = t1.user_id WHERE sur.enabled = '1' AND sur.role_id = #{req.roleId}
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT(#{req.username},'%')
AND su.nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{req.nickname},'%')
ORDER BY su.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT su.id, su.username, su.nickname, sui.telephone, su.data_status, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT sd.dept_name) AS dept_names, su.create_time FROM sys_user su INNER JOIN sys_user_info sui ON sui.user_id = su.id INNER JOIN sys_user_dept sud ON su.id = sud.user_id AND sud.enabled = '1' INNER JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' WHERE su.enabled = '1' AND su.id > 1000000000000000001 AND su.id NOT IN (SELECT tsur.user_id FROM sys_user_role tsur WHERE tsur.enabled = '1' AND tsur.role_id = #{req.roleId} GROUP BY tsur.user_id)
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT(#{req.username},'%')
AND su.nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{req.nickname},'%')
${req.dataScopeSql}
GROUP BY su.id ORDER BY su.id DESC

SELECT DISTINCT su.id, su.username, su.nickname, su.telephone, su.data_status, su.create_time, t1.dept_names FROM sys_user su INNER JOIN (SELECT ta.user_id, LISTAGG(ta.dept_name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ta.dept_name) AS dept_names FROM (SELECT DISTINCT sud.user_id, sd.dept_name FROM sys_user_dept sud INNER JOIN sys_dept sd ON sud.dept_id = sd.id AND sd.enabled = '1' AND sd.data_status = '1' WHERE sud.enabled = '1') ta GROUP BY ta.user_id) t1 ON su.id = t1.user_id WHERE su.enabled = '1' AND su.id > 1000000000000000001 AND su.id NOT IN (SELECT tsur.user_id FROM sys_user_role tsur WHERE tsur.enabled = '1' AND tsur.role_id = #{req.roleId} GROUP BY tsur.user_id)
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT(#{req.username},'%')
AND su.nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{req.nickname},'%')
${req.dataScopeSql}
ORDER BY su.id DESC
SELECT sur.role_id FROM sys_user_role sur INNER JOIN sys_role sr ON sur.role_id = sr.id AND sr.enabled = '1' AND sr.data_status = '1' WHERE sur.enabled = '1' AND sur.user_id = #{userId}
